title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. cyathis
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. cyathis, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat various health issues such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hawkweed include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used as a dried herb, tincture, or infused in teas, and can also be applied topically in the form of salves or creams.
